page_content:
Formerly: KNES152N.

KNES186 Basketball (1 Credit)

Basketball will provide students a comprehensive overview of the

sport by integrating fundamental and advanced basketball skills with

a historical appreciation for the sport and its function in the greater sporting world. Students will learn the rules of basketball, proper techniques and the basic principles of team offense and defense and implement their understanding of each in a series of informal and formal activities.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the SPHL-Kinesiology department.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
